Options: heavy psycannon, storm bolter and Nemesis doomglaive
heavy psycannon, incinerator and Nemesis doomglaive
heavy flamer and Dreadnought combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Wisdom of the Ancients (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Grey Knights Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Grey Knights Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Untouchable Purity
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: One With the Warp (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this model’s unit declares a charge in the same turn it was set up as Reinforcements using the Deep Strike ability, add 3 to the Charge roll.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplar of the Silvered Host
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on a Critical Wound, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strands of Fate (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mindlock
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Brotherhood Techmarine model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by Servitor models in this unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Retinue
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Brotherhood Techmarine model is leading this unit, models in this unit have the Deep Strike and Teleport Assault abilities.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Brotherhood Techmarine (a unit cannot have more than one Servitors unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Might of Titan
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of a phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Order of Purifiers
UnitAbilities.Text: Add the Purifier keyword, and add to the list of units this model can be attached to: Purifiers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Personal Teleporter
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and add the Fly keyword. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Interceptor Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prognosticars' Foresight
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Scouts 6" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness and Wounds characteristics to 5, and add the Terminator keyword. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Brotherhood Terminator Squad, Paladin Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Grey Knights Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Clarion of Haste
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Eye of Judgement
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Haloed in Soulfire
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

UnitAbilities.Title: Hammerhand
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Litanies of Sanctity
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Grey Knights unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sanctic Hood
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warrior Strategist
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Zealous Path
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Guidance of the Ancients
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a Grey Knights model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prognosticars' Foresight
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Scouts 6" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Zealous Path
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Surge of Wrath
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While Damaged, subtract 1 from Hit rolls when it makes attacks.
